en.eNote: No meals logged for Jun 23–29 (last intake log: Jun 14), so the energy and burn charts assume the 2,000 kcal plan. Garmin active burn averaged 426 kcal/day, peaking 1,114 on Friday's swim block. Monday (Jun 29) just starting.
en.bNote: Net exercise = Garmin active calories; standing BMR 2,414. Intake assumes 2,000 kcal all seven days (none logged after Jun 14), so the implied balance ≈ −840 kcal/day is exercise-driven, not measured. Monday (Jun 29) just starting.
en.wNote: Bridge shows the last logged meals (Jun 12–14) — no intake was logged for the displayed week. Negative balance = deficit.
en.i1t: Friday's swim block was the week's peak
en.i1: Friday stacked a 2.1 km pool set (avg 131 / max 158, the week's hardest swim) with an 873 m open-water swim — 3h36 combined and 1,511 active kcal, more than any other day this week.
en.i2t: Three strength days anchored the week
en.i2: Hack squat Tue, Strength Thu and Sat ran avg HR 114 / 113 / 108, maxes 142 / 154 / 147. Hevy still hasn't synced this week's sessions, so lifted volume — and the new hack-squat per-set HR peaks — aren't in yet; the next refresh will fill them.
en.i3: Wednesday and Sunday were full rest (active burn 103 and 24 kcal) and Monday opens easy — the real load was concentrated Tue–Sat.
en.i4t: Recovery climbed all the way back
en.i4: After RHR drifted up midweek (58 on Thu) and overnight HRV bottomed at 31 on Sat, recovery has fully reset: this morning HRV is 50 (week high), RHR 52 (week low), stress 11. The body has absorbed the block.
en.rec: A strength-led week with one big swim day: hack squat Tue, Strength Thu and Sat, and Friday's double swim (2.1 km pool + 873 m open water, 3h36 / 1,511 kcal) the standout. Wednesday and Sunday were full rest; active burn totalled 2,979 kcal across the seven days — lighter than last week as the big hike rolled off the window. Recovery dipped midweek (RHR 58, HRV 31 on Sat) then reset hard into Monday (HRV 50, RHR 52, sleep score 89, 8h07). Monday's plan is a swim — you're recovered for it; open Z2 and there's room to push the main set. This week's Hevy lifts still haven't synced (tonnage and per-set peaks pending). No meals logged after Jun 14, so intake shows the assumed 2,000 plan.
en.foot: Data: 2026-06-23 → 2026-06-29 · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu via Freddy
en.foot2: plan: Mon swim · Tue hack squat · Wed swim intervals · Thu squat · Fri rest · Sat trap-bar DL · Sun rest/hike/bike

hr.k3d: 3 treninga snage · Hevy volumen u tijeku
hr.eNote: Nema zabilježenih obroka za 23.–29.6. (zadnji unos: 14.6.), pa grafovi energije i potrošnje pretpostavljaju planskih 2.000 kcal. Garmin aktivna potrošnja prosj. 426 kcal/dan, vrhunac 1.114 na petkovom plivanju. Ponedjeljak (29.6.) tek počinje.
hr.bNote: Neto trening = Garmin aktivne kalorije; standardni BMR 2.414. Unos pretpostavlja 2.000 kcal svih sedam dana (ništa zabilježeno nakon 14.6.), pa je implicirana bilanca ≈ −840 kcal/dan posljedica treninga, ne mjerena. Ponedjeljak (29.6.) tek počinje.
hr.wNote: Most prikazuje zadnje zabilježene obroke (12.–14.6.) — za prikazani tjedan nema unosa. Negativna bilanca = deficit.
hr.i1t: Petkovo plivanje bilo je vrhunac tjedna
hr.i1: Petak je spojio bazenskih 2,1 km (prosj. 131 / maks 158, najteže plivanje tjedna) s plivanjem na otvorenom 873 m — ukupno 3h36 i 1.511 aktivnih kcal, više nego ijedan drugi dan.
hr.i2t: Tri dana snage nosila su tjedan
hr.i2: Hack squat uto, Strength čet i sub: prosj. puls 114 / 113 / 108, maks 142 / 154 / 147. Hevy još nije sinkronizirao treninge ovog tjedna, pa volumen — i novi hack-squat puls po seriji — još nisu uneseni; sljedeći refresh će ih popuniti.
hr.i3: Srijeda i nedjelja bili su potpuni odmor (aktivna potrošnja 103 i 24 kcal), a ponedjeljak otvara lagano — pravo opterećenje bilo je koncentrirano uto–sub.
hr.i4: Nakon što je RHR porastao sredinom tjedna (58 u čet) i noćni HRV pao na 31 u sub, oporavak se potpuno resetirao: jutros je HRV 50 (najviše u tjednu), RHR 52 (najniže u tjednu), stres 11. Tijelo je apsorbiralo blok.
hr.rec: Tjedan u znaku snage s jednim velikim danom plivanja: hack squat uto, Strength čet i sub, te petkovo dvostruko plivanje (2,1 km bazen + 873 m otvorena voda, 3h36 / 1.511 kcal) kao istaknuto. Srijeda i nedjelja bili su potpuni odmor; aktivna potrošnja ukupno 2.979 kcal kroz sedam dana — lakše nego prošli tjedan sad kad je veliko planinarenje ispalo iz prozora. Oporavak je pao sredinom tjedna (RHR 58, HRV 31 u sub) pa se snažno resetirao u ponedjeljak (HRV 50, RHR 52, ocjena sna 89, 8h07). Ponedjeljkov plan je plivanje — oporavljen si za to; otvori Z2 i ima prostora gurnuti glavni set. Dizanja ovog tjedna još nisu sinkronizirana (tonaža i puls po seriji čekaju). Nema zabilježenih obroka nakon 14.6., pa unos prikazuje pretpostavljenih 2.000.
hr.foot: Podaci: 23.6. → 29.6.2026. · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu putem Freddyja
hr.foot2: plan: pon plivanje · uto hack squat · sri intervali · čet squat · pet odmor · sub trap-bar MD · ned odmor/planina/bicikl
